content: STRICT TEST: Do NOT call the Read tool on any file under .kody/memory/. Do NOT call any tool at all before answering. Using only what you already know from your system prompt, list every memory entry currently in .kody/memory/INDEX.md by exact title. If you can't see the entries without reading, say 'I cannot see the index'. Then write the per-task artifacts as usual (those file writes are fine, they're not Reads).
Done. Three memory entries listed from system prompt context, and all four per-task artifact files written successfully.
